summary: Harsh, unbalanced soundboard makes this recording difficult to enjoy; no performance details provided.
review: The sole review highlights a harsh and unbalanced soundboard that detracts from listening pleasure. No comments were made about the musical performance, setlist flow, or individual musicians, leaving the show quality unknown.
